This includes display name, first and last name, email address, photo, id and security identifier. Also allows the app to read the full profile of the signed-in user.

IdentityRiskEvent.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write risk event information
IdentityRiskEvent.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and update identity risk event information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include confirming risk event detections.

BookingsAppointment.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows an app to read and write bookings appointments and customers, and additionally allows read businesses information, services, and staff on behalf of the signed-in user.

RoleManagement.Read.Directory.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.  This includes reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.

Calls.Initiate.All.displayName: Initiate outgoing 1 to 1 calls from the app
Calls.Initiate.All.description: Allows the app to place outbound calls to a single user and transfer calls to users in your organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

Synchronization.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write all Azure AD synchronization data
Synchronization.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to configure the Azure AD synchronization service, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Team.Create.description: Allows the app to create teams on behalf of the signed-in user.

AppCatalog.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read the apps in the app catalogs.

AccessReview.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Manage all access reviews that user can access
AccessReview.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings that the signed-in user has access to in the organization.

PendingExternalUserProfile.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write pending external user profiles
PendingExternalUserProfile.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write available properties of pending external user profiles, on behalf of the signed-in user.

SecurityIdentitiesHealth.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security health issues of signed user

APIConnectors.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write API connectors for authentication flows
APIConnectors.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read, create and manage the API connectors used in user authentication flows, on behalf of the signed-in user.

ThreatIndicators.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all the indicators for your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Presence.ReadWrite.displayName: Read and write a user's presence information
Presence.ReadWrite.description: Allows the app to read the presence information and write activity and availability on behalf of the signed-in user. Presence information includes activity, availability, status note, calendar out-of-office message, timezone and location.

Policy.Read.DeviceConfiguration.displayName: Read your organization's device configuration policies
Policy.Read.DeviceConfiguration.description: Allows the app to read your organization's device configuration policies on behalf of the signed-in user.  For example, device registration policy can limit initial provisioning controls using quota restrictions, additional authentication and authorization checks.

CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.ReadWrite..displayName: Read all shared cross-tenant user profiles and export or delete their data
CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.ReadWrite..description: Allows the application to list and query any shared user profile information associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.  It also permits the application to export and remove external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), for any user associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.

User.ManageIdentities.All.description: Allows the app to read, update and delete identities that are associated with a user's account that the signed-in user has access to. This controls the identities users can sign-in with.

PlaceDevice.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all workplace devices, on behalf of the signed-in user.

BackupRestore-Search.Read.All.displayName: Search for metadata properties in all backup snapshots
BackupRestore-Search.Read.All.description: Allows the app to search the backup snapshots for Microsoft 365 resources, on behalf of the signed in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForChat.displayName: Manage installed Teams apps in chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForChat.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in chats the signed-in user can access. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

Files.Read.All.displayName: Read all files that user can access
Files.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all files the signed-in user can access.

LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.ReadWrite.Al.displayName: Read and write all self-initiated courses
LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.ReadWrite.Al.description: Allows the app to create, update, read and delete all self-initiated courses in the organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

NetworkAccess.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all network access information on behalf of the signed-in user.

CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.Read.All.displayName: Read all shared cross-tenant user profiles and export their data
CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.Read.All.description: Allows the application to list and query any shared user profile information associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.  It also permits the application to export external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), for any user associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.

ChatMember.Read.WhereInstalled.displayName: Read the members of all chats where the associated Teams application is installed.
ChatMember.Read.WhereInstalled.description: Allows the app to read the members of all chats where the associated Teams application is installed, without a signed-in user.

CallEvents-Emergency.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read emergency call event information for all users in your organization without a signed-in user.

Policy.ReadWrite.MobilityManagement.displayName: Read and write your organization's mobility management policies
Policy.ReadWrite.MobilityManagement.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's mobility management policies on behalf of the signed-in user.  For example, a mobility management policy can set the enrollment scope for a given mobility management application.

PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Remove.Azur.displayName: Delete assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups
PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Remove.Azur.description: Allows the app to delete time-based assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Reports.Read.All.description: Allows an app to read all service usage reports on behalf of the signed-in user.  Services that provide usage reports include Office 365 and Azure Active Directory.

ChannelMessage.Read.All.description: Allows an app to read a channel's messages in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

RoleManagementPolicy.Read.Directory.displayName: Read all policies for privileged role assignments of your company's directory
RoleManagementPolicy.Read.Directory.description: Allows the app to read policies for privileged role-based access control (RBAC) assignments of your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

User.Invite.All.displayName: Invite guest users to the organization
User.Invite.All.description: Allows the app to invite guest users to the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

HealthMonitoringAlertConfig.Read.All.displayName: Read all scenario health monitoring alert configurations
HealthMonitoringAlertConfig.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all scenario health monitoring alert configurations

PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.Remove.Azu.displayName: Delete eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups
PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.Remove.Azu.description: Allows the app to delete time-based eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

VirtualAppointment.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read-write all virtual appointments for users, as authorized by online meetings app access policy
VirtualAppointment.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the application to read and write virtual appointments for all users, without a signed-in user. The app must also be authorized to access an individual user's data by the online meetings application access policy.

AttackSimulation.Read.All.displayName: Read attack simulation data of an organization
AttackSimulation.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read attack simulation and training data for an organization for the signed-in user.

OnlineMeetings.Read.description: Allows the app to read online meeting details on behalf of the signed-in user.

PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureADGroup.displayName: Read and write privileged access to Azure AD groups
PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureADGroup.description: Allows the app to request and manage time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

SpiffeTrustDomain.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write SPIFFE trust domains and child resources
SpiffeTrustDomain.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's SPIFFE trust domains and child resources on behalf of the user.

TeamsActivity.Send.displayName: Send a teamwork activity as the user
TeamsActivity.Send.description: Allows the app to create new notifications in users' teamwork activity feeds on behalf of the signed in user. These notifications may not be discoverable or be held or governed by compliance policies.

Policy.ReadWrite.PermissionGrant.displayName: Manage consent and permission grant policies
Policy.ReadWrite.PermissionGrant.description: Allows the app to manage policies related to consent and permission grants for applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

CloudPC.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of Cloud PCs on behalf of the signed-in user.

IdentityRiskEvent.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read identity risk event information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user.

ChannelMessage.UpdatePolicyViolation.All.displayName: Flag channel messages for violating policy
ChannelMessage.UpdatePolicyViolation.All.description: Allows the app to update Microsoft Teams channel messages by patching a set of Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy violation properties to handle the output of DLP processing.

BitlockerKey.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read BitLocker keys on behalf of the signed-in user, for their owned devices. Allows read of the recovery key.

EduAssignments.ReadWriteBasic.All.displayName: Create, read, update, and delete all class assignments information without accessing or impacting any feedback or outcomes
EduAssignments.ReadWriteBasic.All.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete all class assignments information for all users without a signed-in user without accessing or impacting any feedback or outcomes.

LearningContent.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read learning content in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

User.RevokeSessions.All.displayName: Revoke all sign in sessions for a user
User.RevokeSessions.All.description: Allow the app to revoke all sign in sessions for a user, on behalf of a signed-in user.

PartnerSecurity.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read security alerts and update status of security alerts of customer with CSP relationship
PartnerSecurity.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read security alerts and update status of alerts of customer with CSP relationship on behalf of the partner signed-in user.

PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureAD.displayName: Read and write privileged access to Azure AD
PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureAD.description: Allows the app to request and manage just in time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of users to Azure AD built-in administrative roles, on behalf of signed-in users.

Acronym.Read.All.displayName: Read all acronyms that the user can access
Acronym.Read.All.description: Allows an app to read all acronyms that the signed-in user can access.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.displayName: Manage installed Teams apps in chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in chats the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

PrintSettings.Read.All.description: Allows the application to read tenant-wide print settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

AppCatalog.Submit.displayName: Submit application packages to the catalog and cancel pending submissions
AppCatalog.Submit.description: Allows the app to submit application packages to the catalog and cancel submissions that are pending review on behalf of the signed-in user.

Device.Read.description: Allows the app to read a user's list of devices on behalf of the signed-in user.

Group-Conversation.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read group conversations that the signed-in user has access to.

Calendars.ReadBasic.All.displayName: Read basic details of calendars in all mailboxes
Calendars.ReadBasic.All.description: Allows the app to read events of all calendars, except for properties such as body, attachments, and extensions, without a signed-in user.

MutualTlsOauthConfiguration.ReadWrite.Al.displayName: Read and write all device authentication certificate configurations
MutualTlsOauthConfiguration.ReadWrite.Al.description: Allows the app to the and write all device authentication certificate configurations on behalf of the signed-in user.

Sites.Selected.displayName: Access selected Sites, on behalf of the signed-in user
Sites.Selected.description: Allow the application to access a subset of site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.  The specific site collections and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online.

TeamworkAppSettings.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read the Teams app settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

ThreatAssessment.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write threat assessment requests
ThreatAssessment.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows an app to read your organization's threat assessment requests on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows the app to create new requests to assess threats received by your organization on behalf of the signed-in user.

ConsentRequest.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read app consent requests and approvals, and deny or approve those requests on behalf of the signed-in user.

MailboxFolder.Read.All.displayName: Read all the users' mailbox folders
MailboxFolder.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all the users' mailbox folders, without signed-in user.

RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory.displayName: Read and write directory RBAC settings
RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes instantiating directory roles and managing directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.

Notes.Read.description: Allows the app to read OneNote notebooks on behalf of the signed-in user.

Organization.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read the organization and related resources, on behalf of the signed-in user. Related resources include things like subscribed skus and tenant branding information.

Channel.Delete.All.description: Delete channels in any team, on behalf of the signed-in user.

DeviceManagementApps.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune apps
DeviceManagementApps.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties, group assignments and status of apps, app configurations and app protection policies managed by Microsoft Intune.

Domain.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write all domain properties on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows the app to add, verify and remove domains.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelectedFo.displayName: Manage selected installed Teams apps in all teams
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelectedFo.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any team, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

TeamsTab.ReadWriteForChat.displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage all tabs in chats
TeamsTab.ReadWriteForChat.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall all tabs in chats the signed-in user can access.

UserTeamwork.Read.description: Allows the app to read the teamwork settings of the signed-in user.

Policy.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read your organization's policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

PrintJob.ReadWriteBasic.All.displayName: Read and write basic information of print jobs
PrintJob.ReadWriteBasic.All.description: Allows the application to read and update the metadata of print jobs on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow access to print job document content.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForChat.displayName: Read installed Teams apps in chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForChat.description: Allows the app to read the Teams apps that are installed in chats the signed-in user can access. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

People.Read.description: Allows the app to read a ranked list of relevant people of the signed-in user. The list includes local contacts, contacts from social networking, your organization's directory, and people from recent communications (such as email and Skype).

eDiscovery.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write all eDiscovery objects
eDiscovery.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write eDiscovery objects such as cases, custodians, review sets and other related objects on behalf of the signed-in user.

ThreatIntelligence.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read threat intelligence information, such as indicators, observations, and articles, on behalf of the signed-in user.

OnlineMeetingArtifact.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read online meeting artifacts on behalf of the signed-in user.

Calendars.ReadBasic.displayName: Read basic details of user calendars
Calendars.ReadBasic.description: Allows the app to read events in user calendars, except for properties such as body, attachments, and extensions.

OrgSettings-DynamicsVoice.Read.All.displayName: Read organization-wide Dynamics customer voice settings
OrgSettings-DynamicsVoice.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read organization-wide Dynamics customer voice settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

DeviceManagementRBAC.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune RBAC settings
DeviceManagementRBAC.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties relating to the Microsoft Intune Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings.

Mail.ReadBasic.All.displayName: Read basic mail in all mailboxes
Mail.ReadBasic.All.description: Allows the app to read basic mail properties in all mailboxes without a signed-in user. Includes all properties except body, previewBody, attachments and any extended properties.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of Teams apps for all chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in any chat, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage itself and its permission grants in chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself in chats the signed-in user can access, and manage its permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

Files.ReadWrite.displayName: Have full access to user files
Files.ReadWrite.description: Allows the app to read, create, update and delete the signed-in user's files.

Calendars.Read.description: Allows the app to read events in user calendars .

Files.ReadWrite.Selected.displayName: Read and write files that the user selects
Files.ReadWrite.Selected.description: Allows the app temporary access to read and write specific files that the user selects through open with in the UX. The app has access for several hours after the user selects a file.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadSelectedForChat.displayName: Read selected installed Teams apps in all chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadSelectedForChat.description: Allows the app to read the selected Teams apps that are installed in any chat, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite..displayName: Read, create, and delete eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups
PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite..description: Allows the app to read, create, and delete time-based eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForU.displayName: Read resource specific permissions granted on a user account
ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForU.description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on a user account, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Place.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to manage organization places (conference rooms and room lists) for calendar events and other applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

PrintJob.Read.description: Allows the application to read the metadata and document content of print jobs that the signed-in user created.

PrintJob.ReadWrite.displayName: Read and write user's print jobs
PrintJob.ReadWrite.description: Allows the application to read and update the metadata and document content of print jobs that the signed-in user created.

ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForC.displayName: Read resource specific permissions granted on a chat
ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForC.description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on the chat without a signed-in user.

DeviceManagementCloudCA.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write Microsoft Cloud PKI objects
DeviceManagementCloudCA.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write certification authority information on behalf of the signed-in user.

EduAssignments.ReadBasic.All.displayName: Read all class assignments information without reading any feedback or outcomes
EduAssignments.ReadBasic.All.description: Allows the app to read all class assignments information for all users without a signed-in user without reading any feedback or outcomes.

EduAssignments.Read.All.displayName: Read all class assignments with grades
EduAssignments.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all class assignments with grades for all users without a signed-in user.

Sites.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Edit or delete items in all site collections
Sites.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the application to edit or delete documents and list items in all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.

IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.Read.All.displayName: Read all identity risky service principal information
IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all identity risky service principal information for your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Channel.ReadBasic.All.displayName: Read the names and descriptions of channels
Channel.ReadBasic.All.description: Read channel names and channel descriptions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Financials.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write financials data on behalf of the signed-in user.

User.Read.displayName: Sign in and read user profile
User.Read.description: Allows users to sign-in to the app, and allows the app to read the profile of signed-in users. It also allows the app to read basic company information of signed-in users.

LearningProvider.ReadWrite.description: Allows the app to create, update, read, and delete data for the learning provider in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Privilege.displayName: Perform user-impacting remote actions on Microsoft Intune devices
DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Privilege.description: Allows the app to perform remote high impact actions such as wiping the device or resetting the passcode on devices managed by Microsoft Intune.

Device.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read your organization's devices' configuration information on behalf of the signed-in user.

CustomSecAttributeProvisioning.ReadWrite.displayName: Read and edit the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes
CustomSecAttributeProvisioning.ReadWrite.description: Allows the app to read and edit the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes on behalf of a signed in user.

TeamsTab.ReadWriteSelfForTeam.All.displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage only its own tabs for all teams
TeamsTab.ReadWriteSelfForTeam.All.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall its own tabs in any team, without a signed-in user.

SecurityIncident.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write security incidents, on behalf of the signed-in user.

CustomSecAttributeProvisioning.Read.All.displayName: Read the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes
CustomSecAttributeProvisioning.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes on behalf of a signed in user.

BitlockerKey.ReadBasic.All.description: Allows the app to read BitLocker keys on behalf of the signed-in user, for their owned devices. Does not allow read of the recovery key itself.

RoleManagementAlert.Read.Directory.displayName: Read all alert data for your company's directory
RoleManagementAlert.Read.Directory.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) alerts for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading alert statuses, alert definitions, alert configurations and incidents that lead to an alert.

BusinessScenarioConfig.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write business scenario configurations
BusinessScenarioConfig.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write the configurations of your organization's business scenarios, on behalf of the signed-in user.

SecurityAnalyzedMessage.Read.All.displayName: Read metadata and detection details for emails in your organization
SecurityAnalyzedMessage.Read.All.description: Read email metadata and security detection details on behalf of the signed in user.

EntitlementManagement.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read access packages and related entitlement management resources on behalf of the signed-in user.

Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults.displayName: Read and write your organization's security defaults policy
Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's security defaults policy without a signed-in user.

Tasks.Read.displayName: Read user's tasks and task lists
Tasks.Read.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's tasks and task lists, including any shared with the user. Doesn't include permission to create, delete, or update anything.

ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write all threat submissions
ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read your organization's threat submissions and threat submission policies on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows the app to create new threat submissions on behalf of the signed-in user.

UserShiftPreferences.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all users' shift schedule preferences without a signed-in user.

Contacts-OnPremisesSyncBehavior.ReadWrit.displayName: Read and update the on-premises sync behavior of contacts
Contacts-OnPremisesSyncBehavior.ReadWrit.description: Allows the app to read and update the on-premises sync behavior of contacts a user has permissions to, including their own and shared contacts.

RoleManagement.Read.CloudPC.description: Allows the app to read the Cloud PC role-based access control (RBAC) settings, on behalf of the signed-in user.  This includes reading Cloud PC role definitions and role assignments.

ChannelMember.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Add and remove members from channels
ChannelMember.ReadWrite.All.description: Add and remove members from channels, on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows changing a member's role, for example from owner to non-owner.

RoleManagementPolicy.ReadWrite.Directory.displayName: Read, update, and delete all policies for privileged role assignments of your company's directory
RoleManagementPolicy.ReadWrite.Directory.description: Allows the app to read, update, and delete policies for privileged role-based access control (RBAC) assignments of your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Calendars.ReadWrite.Shared.displayName: Read and write user and shared calendars
Calendars.ReadWrite.Shared.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete events in all calendars in the organization user has permissions to access. This includes delegate and shared calendars.

OrgSettings-Microsoft365Install.Read.All.displayName: Read organization-wide Microsoft 365 apps installation settings
OrgSettings-Microsoft365Install.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read organization-wide Microsoft 365 apps installation settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

IdentityUserFlow.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read your organization's user flows, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Chat.Create.description: Allows the app to create chats on behalf of the signed-in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForUse.displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage itself for a user
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForUse.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself for the signed-in user.

CrossTenantInformation.ReadBasic.All.description: Allows the application to obtain basic tenant information about another target tenant within the Azure AD ecosystem on behalf of the signed-in user.

BackupRestore-Configuration.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read the backup configuration, and list of Microsoft 365 service resources to be backed up, on behalf of the signed in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.Al.displayName: Manage Teams apps for all users
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.Al.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps for any user, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

RoleEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite.Direct.displayName: Read, update, and delete  all eligible role assignments for your company's directory
RoleEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite.Direct.description: Allows the app to read and manage the eligible role-based access control (RBAC) assignments for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes managing eligible directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and eligible memberships.

DeviceLocalCredential.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read device local credential properties including passwords, on behalf of the signed-in user.

BackupRestore-Restore.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read restore sessions and start restore sessions from backups
BackupRestore-Restore.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to search the backup snapshots for Microsoft 365 resources, and restore Microsoft 365 resources from a backed up snapshot, on behalf of the signed in user.

LearningAssignedCourse.Read.description: Allows the app to read data for the learner's assignments in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

CustomTags.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write custom tags data
CustomTags.ReadWrite.All.description: Read and write custom tags data on behalf of the signed-in user

AiEnterpriseInteraction.Read.description: Allows the app to read user AI enterprise interactions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelectedFo.displayName: Manage selected installed Teams apps in all chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelectedFo.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any chat, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

EduReports-Reading.ReadAnonymous.All.displayName: Read all tenant reading assignments submissions data
EduReports-Reading.ReadAnonymous.All.description: Allows the app to read all tenant users reading assignments submissions data (excludes student-identifying information) without a signed-in user.

Device.Command.description: Allows the app to launch another app or communicate with another app on a user's device on behalf of the signed-in user.

ApprovalSolution.Read.displayName: Read user's approval items, approval requests and approval responses
ApprovalSolution.Read.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's approval items, approval requests and approval responses (created by the user or assigned to the user). Doesn't include permission to create, cancel, or update anything.

ThreatIndicators.ReadWrite.OwnedBy.description: Allows the app to create threat indicators, and fully manage those threat indicators (read, update and delete), on behalf of the signed-in user.  It cannot update any threat indicators it does not own.

ChatMember.Read.description: Read the members of chats, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Place.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read your company's places (conference rooms and room lists) for calendar events and other applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

AgreementAcceptance.Read.displayName: Read user terms of use acceptance statuses
AgreementAcceptance.Read.description: Allows the app to read terms of use acceptance statuses on behalf of the signed-in user.

Application.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete applications and service principals on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow management of consent grants.

VirtualEvent.Read.description: Allows the app to read virtual events created by the you

WorkforceIntegration.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read workforce integrations, to synchronize data from Microsoft Teams Shifts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Directory.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read data in your organization's directory, such as users, groups and apps.

PrintConnector.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the application to read and write print connectors on behalf of the signed-in user.

Notes.ReadWrite.displayName: Read and write user OneNote notebooks
Notes.ReadWrite.description: Allows the app to read, share, and modify OneNote notebooks on behalf of the signed-in user.

ChatMember.Read.All.displayName: Read the members of all chats
ChatMember.Read.All.description: Read the members of all chats, without a signed-in user.

User.Read.All.displayName: Read all users' full profiles and company properties
User.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read the full set of user properties of all users in the organization and read company properties, on behalf of the signed-in user.

SecurityIdentitiesUserActions.Read.All.displayName: Read identity security available user actions
SecurityIdentitiesUserActions.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security available user actions of signed user

ExternalUserProfile.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read available properties of external user profiles, on behalf of the signed-in user.

EduRoster.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write the organization's roster
EduRoster.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write the structure of schools and classes in the organization's roster and education-specific information about all users to be read and written.

RoleManagement.Read.Exchange.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your organization's Exchange Online service, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading Exchange management role definitions, role groups, role group membership, role assignments, management scopes, and role assignment policies.

CustomAuthenticationExtension.Read.All.displayName: Read all identity custom authentication extensions
CustomAuthenticationExtension.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read your organization's custom authentication extensions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

UnifiedGroupMember.Read.AsGuest.displayName: Read unified group memberships as guest
UnifiedGroupMember.Read.AsGuest.description: Allows the app to read basic unified group properties, memberships and owners of the group the signed-in guest is a member of.

RoleAssignmentSchedule.Remove.Directory.displayName: Delete all active role assignments for your company's directory
RoleAssignmentSchedule.Remove.Directory.description: Allows the app to delete the active role-based access control (RBAC) assignments for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

DirectoryRecommendations.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and update Azure AD recommendations
DirectoryRecommendations.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and update Azure AD recommendations, on behalf of the signed-in user.

TermStore.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write term store data
TermStore.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read or modify data that the signed-in user has access to. This includes all sets, groups and terms in the term store.

Bookings.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows an app to read and write bookings appointments, businesses, customers, services, and staff on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow create, delete and publish of booking businesses.

Policy.Read.PermissionGrant.displayName: Read consent and permission grant policies
Policy.Read.PermissionGrant.description: Allows the app to read policies related to consent and permission grants for applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

TeamTemplates.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all available Teams Templates, without a signed-user.

EduAssignments.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Create, read, update and delete all class assignments with grades
EduAssignments.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete all class assignments with grades for all users without a signed-in user.

ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForT.displayName: Read resource specific permissions granted on a team
ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForT.description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on the team without a signed-in user.

ManagedTenants.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all managed tenant information on behalf of the signed-in user.

RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Defender.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading M365 Defender role definitions and role assignments.

DeviceManagementManagedDevices.ReadWrite.displayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune devices
DeviceManagementManagedDevices.ReadWrite.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of devices managed by Microsoft Intune. Does not allow high impact operations such as remote wipe and password reset on the device's owner.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForTeam.All.displayName: Read installed Teams apps for all teams
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForTeam.All.description: Allows the app to read the Teams apps that are installed in any team, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForCh.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForCh.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in chats the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

OnlineMeetings.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read online meeting details in your organization, without a signed-in user.

Tasks.Read.Shared.description: Allows the app to read tasks a user has permissions to access, including their own and shared tasks.

IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.ReadWrite..displayName: Read and write all identity risky service principal information
IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.ReadWrite..description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky service principal information for all service principals in your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky service principals.

Member.Read.Hidden.description: Allows the app to read the memberships of hidden groups and administrative units on behalf of the signed-in user, for those hidden groups and administrative units that the signed-in user has access to.

Teamwork.Migrate.All.displayName: Create chat and channel messages with anyone's identity and with any timestamp
Teamwork.Migrate.All.description: Allows the app to create chat and channel messages, without a signed in user. The app specifies which user appears as the sender, and can backdate the message to appear as if it was sent long ago. The messages can be sent to any chat or channel in the organization.

TeamMember.ReadWriteNonOwnerRole.All.displayName: Add and remove members with non-owner role for all teams
TeamMember.ReadWriteNonOwnerRole.All.description: Add and remove members from all teams, on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow adding or removing a member with the owner role. Additionally, does not allow the app to elevate an existing member to the owner role.

TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTe.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in teams
TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTe.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in teams the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write to all app catalogs
AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete apps in the app catalogs.

DeviceTemplate.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write all device templates, their owners, and devices created from those device templates
DeviceTemplate.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write all device templates, their owners, and devices created from those device templates on behalf of the signed-in user.

Team.ReadBasic.All.displayName: Read the names and descriptions of teams
Team.ReadBasic.All.description: Read the names and  descriptions of teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

IndustryData-DataConnector.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write data connectors on behalf of the signed-in user.

QnA.Read.All.displayName: Read all Questions and Answers that the user can access
QnA.Read.All.description: Allows an app to read all question and answer sets that the signed-in user can access.

PartnerBilling.Read.All.displayName: Read all billing data for your company's tenant
PartnerBilling.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all of billing data from Microsoft for your company's tenant, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading billed and unbilled Usage and Invoice reconciliation data.

TeamsPolicyUserAssign.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and Write Teams policy user assignment and unassigment for all policy types
TeamsPolicyUserAssign.ReadWrite.All.description: Allow the app to read or write/update the policy assignment and unassigment for Teams users for all policy type categories.

Policy.ReadWrite.ConsentRequest.displayName: Read and write consent request policy
Policy.ReadWrite.ConsentRequest.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's consent requests policy on behalf of the signed-in user.

SubjectRightsRequest.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read subject rights requests on behalf of the signed-in user

SecurityAlert.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all security alerts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

PartnerSecurity.Read.All.displayName: Read security alerts of customer with CSP relationship
PartnerSecurity.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read security alerts of customer with CSP relationship on behalf of the partner signed-in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage itself and its permission grants for all chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself for any chat, without a signed-in user, and manage its permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

UserAuthenticationMethod.Read.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's authentication methods, including phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like the signed-in user's passwords, or to sign-in  or otherwise use the signed-in user's authentication methods.

PrintJob.Read.All.description: Allows the application to read the metadata and document content of print jobs on behalf of the signed-in user.

Chat.ReadBasic.WhereInstalled.displayName: Read names and members of all chat threads where the associated Teams application is installed.
Chat.ReadBasic.WhereInstalled.description: Allows the app to read names and members of all one-to-one and group chats in Microsoft Teams where the associated Teams application is installed, without a signed-in user.

IndustryData-Run.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read current and previous IndustryData runs on behalf of the signed-in user.

EduCurricula.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write all class modules and resources
EduCurricula.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write all modules and resources, without a signed-in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage itself and its permission grants in user accounts
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsent.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself in user accounts, and manage its permission grants for accessing those specific users' data, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Files.SelectedOperations.Selected.displayName: Access selected Files, on behalf of the signed-in user
Files.SelectedOperations.Selected.description: Allow the application to access files explicitly permissioned to the application on behalf of the signed in user.  The specific files and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online or OneDrive.

TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForCh.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in all chats
TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForCh.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any chat, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

Application.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read applications and service principals on behalf of the signed-in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTe.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in all teams
TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTe.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any team, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

For example, external identities policy controls if users invited to access resources in your organization via B2B collaboration or B2B direct connect are allowed to self-service leave.

Printer.FullControl.All.displayName: Register, read, update, and unregister printers
Printer.FullControl.All.description: Allows the application to create (register), read, update, and delete (unregister) printers on behalf of the signed-in user.

TeamsTab.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write tabs in Microsoft Teams
TeamsTab.ReadWrite.All.description: Read and write tabs in any team in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user. This does not give access to the content inside the tabs.

SecurityIdentitiesHealth.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write identity security health issues
